pages.text: $(o)"One dragon settles a riot. Eighteen dragons rehearse the apocalypse."$()$(br2)Eastern incantor heirloom. Eighteen scaled serpents painted in cinnabar — when activated, each clamps onto a target.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Pick up to $(l)20 random hostiles$() within $(l)20 blocks$() and deal $(l)12 magic damage$() to each.$(br2)Targeting is random but hit rate is high.$(br2)Cost: $(l)6000$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Wide-area shave. More targets, lower per-target damage than Solar Judgement — better for sparse swarms.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 4 Dominion$() or above.
